No. 2935(E).-In exercise of the powers conferred by Sub- section (l) of Section 3 of the National Commissionfor MinoritiesAct, 1992(19of 1992)asamended vide the National Commission for Minorities (Amendment) Act, 1995 (44 of 1995) the Central Government hereby appoints Prof. Farida Abdullah Khan, as Member of the said Commission under Sub-section (2) of that Section for a period of three years with effect from the date of assumption 01" office by her. [No. 1-2I20l2-NeM(Pt.)] RAKESH MOHAN, Jt. Secy. Printed by the Manager. Government of India Press, Ring Road.
